race.comment: ESPRIT DU JOUR (5) is a very honest campaigner who has only missed a drum once in nine attempts over this distance range. Gets 1.5kg off from the low draw and shapes as a leading contender in a race decimated by scratchings. Former Victorian DIVINE JUSTICE (6) is having her first run for the new stable but should find this easier than what she faced down south. Respect any market confidence. IMMEDIATE (9) doesn't win out of turn but is usually thereabouts and is a must for the exotics players. Stablemate LAND BANK (3) has a handy record around this circuit with a win and a placing from two attempts. In the mix while fresh.
